title:
Just launched WorldForge - a complete worldbuilding & conlang Notion template!

Build entire fictional universes with:
- Constructed language builder
- Culture & society databases
- Character trackers
- Magic systems
- Timeline builders

Filled with real examples from the Spiralverse.

https://aetherdavis.gumroad.com/l/worldforge
